articles.title: Local obituary: Louisa Gag, 36, lifelong Boston resident and safe streets advocate
articles.description:
"Her friends and family remember her as the most outgoing introvert you can imagine."

The post Local obituary: Louisa Gag, 36, lifelong Boston resident and safe streets advocate appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Louisa Gag, 36, passed away, remembered as a passionate advocate for safe streets in Boston.
She was a lifelong Boston resident, impacting local community safety initiatives significantly.
Her advocacy work inspired many, highlighting the importance of safe streets for residents.

articles.title: The heat is on: The average MLB fastball velocity is up for the 6th straight year to 94.7 mph
articles.description:
“You watch a Triple-A game, most everybody that’s coming out of the bullpen left-handed or right-handed is throwing 95-plus."

The post The heat is on: The average MLB fastball velocity is up for the 6th straight year to 94.7 mph appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MLB fastball velocity averages 94.7 mph, marking a six-year increase.
Triple-A pitchers frequently exceed 95 mph, reflecting rising talent levels.
Boston fans may see faster-paced games and increased strikeouts this season.
